description_long: This is a full-size computer keyboard with a sleek, low-profile design and a glossy black finish. The keyboard features a standard QWERTY key layout, including a numeric keypad on the right side, function keys along the top, and a set of arrow and navigation keys. The keycaps are rectangular with white printed legends, providing high contrast against the dark background. The surface appears smooth and slightly reflective, with a gentle curve along the top edge for ergonomic comfort. A brand logo is visible in the upper right corner, adding a touch of branding to the otherwise minimalist design. The keyboard is compact in height and likely constructed primarily from plastic, with internal components such as circuit boards and rubber domes or mechanical switches.
description: A glossy black full-size keyboard with white legends, numeric keypad, and a sleek, low-profile design. The surface is smooth and slightly reflective, with a visible brand logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full key layout, including the main typing area and numeric keypad.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the keyboard's slim profile and gentle top curve.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the keyboard's back edge and overall width.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again emphasizing the low height and key arrangement.
